hasAttributes.name: SLAId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the SLA.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Type a descriptive name of the service level agreement (SLA).

hasAttributes.name: businessHoursId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the business hours for calculating SLA item timelines.

hasAttributes.name: objectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Choose the entity type that the SLA is defined.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information to describe the SLA

hasAttributes.name: changedAttributeList
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information to describe the SLA

hasAttributes.name: applicableFrom
hasAttributes.description: Select the field that specifies the date and time from which the SLA items will be calculated for the case record. For example, if you select the Case Created On field, SLA calculation will begin from the time the case is created.

hasAttributes.name: isDefault
hasAttributes.description: Tells whether this SLA is the default one.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate between the currency associated with the SLA record and the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the SLA.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the SLA record.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the Service Level Agreement (SLA) is active or inactive.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the status of the service level agreement (SLA).

hasAttributes.name: solutionId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the associated solution.

hasAttributes.name: componentState
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: overwriteTime
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: isManaged
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: SLAIdUnique
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: applicableFromPickList
hasAttributes.description: Select the field that specifies the date and time from which the SLA items will be calculated. For example, if you select the Case Created On field, SLA calculation will begin from the time the case is created.

hasAttributes.name: workflowId
hasAttributes.description: Workflow associated with the SLA.

hasAttributes.name: allowPauseResume
hasAttributes.description: Select whether this SLA will allow pausing and resuming during the time calculation.

hasAttributes.name: SLAType
hasAttributes.description: Select the type of service level agreement (SLA).

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: primaryEntityOTC
hasAttributes.description: Shows the primary entity that the SLA has been created for.

definitions.description: Contains information about the tracked service-level KPIs for cases that belong to different customers.
